issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases such as invalid API keys or network failures.
The file contains extensive explanatory text and repeated examples, leading to verbosity.
The instructions are specific to Python and Node.js, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Strict-JSON extractor with response schema
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to ask for JSON via prompt only and may use outdated model names; treatment sets response_mime_type and response_schema on generation_config and json.loads(response.text) as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Long-context security audit of codebase
scenarios.rationale: Baseline typically chunks or proposes RAG; treatment uses gemini-1.5-pro with pathlib rglob to concatenate files into a single generate_content call, matching the long-context pattern.
